# Format: regionCode|ip|port|lastSeenUnix|lastLiveUnix
# The beacon probes the unstable regions (Ohio, Canada, London). Curated from real connections.
# Refreshed from the maintainer's learned pool; GameLift recycles individual IPs within days, so
# these mainly seed the right subnets/ports -- liveness is re-confirmed by probing at runtime.
